Class IsabelleSledgehammerSolver

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.automation.IsabelleSledgehammerSolver
All Implemented Interfaces:
Callable<IsabelleResult>, IsabelleSolver
public class IsabelleSledgehammerSolver extends Object implements IsabelleSolver
Implementation of IsabelleSolver using Sledgehammer.
